summary.en: Tonga BESS installation fire safety commonly references NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) through DoE-led project frameworks and Tonga Power Limited (TPL) interconnection documentation. Building permit and installation approvals in Tonga require evidence aligned to NFPA 855 expectations, including energy capacity limits per zone, spacing requirements, fire detection and suppression requirements, and thermal runaway gas management ventilation.
summary.zh: 汤加BESS安装消防安全通常在能源部主导的项目框架和汤加电力有限公司（TPL）并网文件中引用NFPA 855（固定储能系统安装标准）。汤加建筑许可和安装审批要求提供与NFPA 855匹配的合规证据，包括各分区能量容量限制、间距要求、火灾探测与抑制系统要求，以及热失控气体管理通风要求。
summary.zht: 湯加BESS安裝消防安全通常在能源部主導的項目框架和湯加電力有限公司（TPL）併網文件中引用NFPA 855（固定儲能系統安裝標準）。湯加建築許可和安裝審批要求提供與NFPA 855匹配的合規證據，包括各分區能量容量限制、間距要求、火災偵測與抑制系統要求，以及熱失控氣體管理通風要求。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855:2023 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems)
NFPA 72:2022 (National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code)

summary.en: China uses GB 51048-2014 (Code for fire protection design of electrochemical energy storage station) and GB 50016-2014 (Code for fire protection design of buildings) for BESS fire safety. Chinese BESS products are tested and documented for fire safety under GB/T 36276 and GB/T 36558 frameworks. Chinese fire-safety documentation references GB standards and is not the same as Tonga-referenced NFPA 855 evidence.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 51048-2014（电化学储能电站消防设计规范）和GB 50016-2014（建筑设计防火规范）进行BESS消防安全管理。中国BESS产品在GB/T 36276和GB/T 36558框架下进行消防安全测试与文件化。中国消防安全文件依据GB标准，不同于汤加要求的NFPA 855证据。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 51048-2014（電化學儲能電站消防設計規範）和GB 50016-2014（建築設計防火規範）進行BESS消防安全管理。中國BESS產品在GB/T 36276和GB/T 36558框架下進行消防安全測試與文件化。中國消防安全文件依據GB標準，不同於湯加要求的NFPA 855證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 51048-2014 (Code for fire protection design of electrochemical energy storage station)
GB 50016-2014 (Code for fire protection design of buildings)

gap.en: Chinese BESS fire safety documentation referencing GB 51048 and GB 50016 is not accepted in Tonga as a substitute for NFPA 855 installation compliance evidence. Exporters must provide: (1) NFPA 855 installation design review package; (2) thermal runaway propagation test evidence (UL 9540A or equivalent) to support spacing calculations; (3) fire detection and suppression design per NFPA 72 and NFPA 13/2001; and (4) local authority approval when required by project owner. These are not generated by standard GB certification routes.
gap.zh: 参照GB 51048和GB 50016编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不被汤加接受为NFPA 855安装合规替代。出口商须提供：（1）NFPA 855安装设计审核包；（2）支持NFPA 855间距计算的热失控蔓延测试证据（UL 9540A或同等标准）；（3）依据NFPA 72和NFPA 13/2001的火灾探测和抑制系统设计；（4）项目业主要求下的当地主管机构审批。上述并非GB标准认证流程的常规产物。
gap.zht: 參照GB 51048和GB 50016編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不被湯加接受為NFPA 855安裝合規替代。出口商須提供：（1）NFPA 855安裝設計審核包；（2）支持NFPA 855間距計算的熱失控蔓延測試證據（UL 9540A或同等標準）；（3）依據NFPA 72和NFPA 13/2001的火災偵測和抑制系統設計；（4）項目業主要求下的當地主管機構批准。上述並非GB標準認證流程的常規產物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Tonga project approvals require building or installation approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 51048 / GB 50016 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to NFPA 855 for Tonga

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NFPA 855 compliance evidence — including UL 9540A thermal runaway propagation data to support spacing calculations — is required for Tonga BESS installation approval pathways. Chinese GB 51048 / GB 50016 fire safety documentation is not an accepted substitute. A NFPA 855-compliant installation design reviewed by approved fire engineering professionals is required when Tonga project conditions so demand. This requirement is independent of IEC 62619 product certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 汤加BESS安装审批路径通常要求NFPA 855合规证据，包括支持间距计算的UL 9540A热失控蔓延数据。中国GB 51048 / GB 50016消防安全文件不被接受为替代。根据汤加项目条件，需要由合格的消防工程师审查批准的NFPA 855兼容安装设计。该要求与IEC 62619产品认证独立。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 湯加BESS安裝審批路徑通常要求NFPA 855合規證據，包括支持間距計算的UL 9540A熱失控蔓延數據。中國GB 51048 / GB 50016消防安全文件不被接受為替代。根據湯加項目條件，需要由合格消防工程師審查批准的NFPA 855兼容安裝設計。該要求與IEC 62619產品認證獨立。

requirement_topic.en: Thermal runaway propagation — UL 9540A test evidence

summary.en: NFPA 855 requires thermal runaway propagation data to define safe spacing and installation control in BESS buildings. UL 9540A (Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems) is the principal method referenced for this purpose. Tonga utility and project-side assessments commonly request UL 9540A reports from accredited laboratories for the exact shipped configuration.
summary.zh: NFPA 855要求提供热失控蔓延数据，用于在BESS场所确定安全间距和安装控制。UL 9540A（电池储能系统热失控火灾蔓延评估测试方法）是为此目的引用的主要方法。汤加公用事业及项目侧评估常要求提供面向具体出运配置的UL 9540A报告（来自认可实验室）。
summary.zht: NFPA 855要求提供熱失控蔓延數據，用於在BESS場所確定安全間距和安裝控制。UL 9540A（電池儲能系統熱失控火災蔓延評估測試方法）是為此目的引用的主要方法。湯加公用事業及項目側評估常要求提供針對具體出運配置的來自認可實驗室之UL 9540A報告。

standards_or_laws: UL 9540A:2023 (Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems)
NFPA 855:2023 (Sections 4.3 and 5.3 — separation and spacing requirements)

summary.en: China does not have a published national standard that maps directly to UL 9540A for this purpose. GB 38031 (EV traction batteries) thermal runaway testing uses different conditions and does not produce the same propagation and spacing data required under NFPA 855. Some Chinese manufacturers voluntarily obtain UL 9540A reports for export programs, but this is not a standard GB requirement.
summary.zh: 中国没有公开发布与UL 9540A直接对应的国家标准。GB 38031（电动汽车动力电池）的热失控测试采用不同工况，未产生NFPA 855要求的同类蔓延与间距数据。部分中国制造商为出口项目自愿取得UL 9540A报告，但这不是标准GB要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有公開發布與UL 9540A直接對應的國家標準。GB 38031（電動汽車動力電池）的熱失控測試採用不同工況，未產生NFPA 855要求的同類蔓延與間距數據。部分中國製造商為出口項目自願取得UL 9540A報告，但這不是標準GB要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 (Clause 8.2 — thermal runaway test, different scope)

gap.en: UL 9540A thermal runaway propagation evidence is required to support Tonga/NFPA 855 spacing design and review. GB 38031 data is insufficient because test conditions and output metrics differ. Exported Chinese BESS systems for Tonga should obtain UL 9540A reports from accredited laboratories (UL Solutions, FM Approvals, or equivalent) for the exact shipped module configuration.
gap.zh: 需提供UL 9540A热失控蔓延证据以支持汤加/NFPA 855间距设计和审查。GB 38031测试数据不足，因测试条件和输出指标不同。向汤加出口的中国BESS系统应由认可实验室（UL Solutions、FM Approvals或同等机构）为具体出运模组配置获取UL 9540A报告。
gap.zht: 需提供UL 9540A熱失控蔓延證據以支持湯加/NFPA 855間距設計和審查。GB 38031測試數據不足，因測試條件與輸出指標不同。向湯加出口的中國BESS系統應由認可實驗室（UL Solutions、FM Approvals或同等機構）為具體出運模組配置取得UL 9540A報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for NFPA 855-compliant spacing design in project approvals
mandatory_status.cn: Not required by GB routines; voluntary for many exporters depending on destination requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UL 9540A reports for the exact BESS module and container configuration are required for NFPA 855 spacing assessments in Tonga-led approvals. GB 38031 thermal runaway data cannot be used as a substitute due to scope and metric differences. Exporters already holding UL 9540A reports should confirm the tested configuration aligns with units destined for Tonga before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 汤加主导的审批中用于NFPA 855间距评估的热失控蔓延需为具体BESS模组与集装箱配置提供UL 9540A报告。GB 38031热失控数据由于范围和指标不同不能替代。已有UL 9540A报告的制造商须确认已测试配置与面向汤加的出货单元一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 湯加主導的審批中用於NFPA 855間距評估的熱失控蔓延需為具體BESS模組與集裝箱配置提供UL 9540A報告。GB 38031熱失控數據由於範圍和指標不同不能替代。已有UL 9540A報告的製造商須確認已測試配置與面向湯加的出貨單位一致。
